05 — Misc / Projects

Projects — Todd Libby

5

Built things

Side projects, portfolio work, and tools I've built — some for clients, some for the stream, most for myself.

  • ZulkirBot Live

    Fully featured Twitch chat RPG bot with two bot accounts, combat system, spellbook, rogue skills, and D&D mechanics built around Dungeons & Dragons Online.

    NodeTypeScriptSupabasetmi.jsDDO
  • BranchFlow Live

    Keyboard-accessible Git history explorer with SVG commit graph, ARIA live regions, and light, dark, and high-contrast modes.

    Nuxt 4TypeScriptGitHub APISVGVanilla CSSNetlify
    Visit site
  • BasketBuddy Live

    Grocery budgeting PWA with Stripe subscriptions, category management, and mobile-first UI.

    Nuxt 4SupabaseStripePWApnpm
    Visit site
  • Blurcle Live

    Bluesky analytics — engagement metrics, activity charts, and repost filtering.

    Nuxt 4Bluesky APInpm
    Visit site Source
  • ddo-overlay Live

    OBS browser source overlay pulling live character data from the DDO Audit API via URL query params.

    TypeScriptDDO Audit APINetlify
    Visit site
  • RouteReady In progress

    Route management SaaS for tracking drivers, vehicles, and properties.

    Nuxt 4SupabasePostgreSQLBetter AuthNetlify
  • Chirp In progress

    Twitter-style social platform with full auth, follow system, RLS, and accessibility preferences.

    Nuxt 4SupabaseRLSTypeScript
  • Broadcast Retired

    Multi-platform social posting — Bluesky, Mastodon, and LinkedIn from one place.

    Nuxt 4SupabaseOAuthBluesky API
    Source

Total projects

8

Status key

  • Live — deployed and running
  • In progress — actively building
  • Retired — archived or sunset
